title: Décor Insulated Stainless Steel Coffee Cup | Travel for Hot & Cold Drinks | 350ml, 12oz - Rose Gold
features: Up to 4 Hours Hot - Drink your coffee or tea on go with Décor’s 350ml double wall insulated travel flask
Up to 12 Hours Cold - Not just for hot drinks, you can keep cold drinks cool for up to 12 hours on those warmer summer days
Leakproof Seal - Food grade silicone seal ensures a leakproof finish which makes this flask perfect for carrying around on a busy day
Cost-Saving & Eco-Friendly - Help save the planet and avoid single-use coffee cups with Décor's reusable travel flasks
Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 60 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
